shadows.name: soft-panel
shadows.purpose: Used when floating panels need separation

components.name: Add expense button
components.css: button { border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: #f8fbf8; color: #142720; padding: 12px 18px; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Expense row
components.css: article { border: 1px solid #16332b; border-radius: 18px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.62); padding: 26px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; }

narrative.overview: Keep the tracker practical, compact, and legible.

rules.name: Preserve state clarity
rules.body: Expense count and row content should stay readable during live previews.

rules.name: Keep controls compact
rules.body: Buttons and pills should feel like app controls, not marketing CTAs.

dos: Use green surfaces with strong foreground contrast.
Keep expense rows easy to scan.
donts: Do not introduce decorative hero layouts.
Do not hide the open-count status.
